steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend for account 801234567
Submit formal claim citing DE-NO tax treaty Article 10 reducing withholding from 25% to 15% for Norwegian residents
Provide supporting documentation: Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty rate calculation showing correct net should be EUR 165,656.25
If custodian denies claim, file refund application directly with German tax authorities (BZSt) under Section 32(6) KStG

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
